fix_applied.action: Replaced hardcoded 'stability = 0.5' with actual stability calculation
fix_applied.note: Also fixed return statement to return 'stability' instead of 'hit_stability'

stability_values_after_fix.note: Stability now varies (was constant 0.5 before fix)

analysis.what_fixed: Stability now calculates real value from prediction_history instead of constant 0.5
analysis.current_behavior: All 4 states present (HOT, COLD, CHAOTIC, TRANSITION) - state space no longer collapsed to single state
analysis.remaining_issue: TRANSITION dominates at 78.67% because: (1) stability < 0.6 triggers TRANSITION vote, (2) regime_shift is always False so no additional TRANSITION from regime, but (3) stability varies enough to frequently hit < 0.6 threshold
analysis.root_cause_of_transition_dominance: StateDetector voting is structurally biased toward TRANSITION when stability vote fires frequently. Each period where stability < 0.6 gets at least 1 TRANSITION vote, and with stability ranging 0.50-0.70, approximately 70% of periods trigger this.

achievement.note: Previously HOT dominated at 62.5%. Now all states present, though TRANSITION dominates.

stability_fix_report.gate_result: FAIL - TRANSITION dominates but all 4 required states are present
